calendar.matters:
MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD
Off Calendar Jul-20-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PETITIONER V. THRELKELD'S MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Motion granted pursuant to statement of non-opposition filed by respondent.

Order signed. Separate judgment signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/EPS)
